member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Adapters.BudgetAccountSegmentDto
member.summary: Output DTO for a budget account segment.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Adapters.BudgetAccountSegmentMapper
member.summary: Mapping methods for budget account segments.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Adapters.BudgetSegmentTypesMapper
member.summary: Maps BudgetSegmentType instances to data transfer objects.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Adapters.BudgetMapper
member.summary: Maps Budget instances to data transfer objects.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Adapters.BudgetTypeMapper
member.summary: Maps BudgetType instances to data transfer objects.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Data.BudgetAccountSegmentDataService
member.summary: Provides data access services for budget account segments.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.BudgetAccount
member.summary: Partitioned type that represents a budget account.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.BudgetAccountSegment
member.summary: Partitioned type of BudgetAccountSegmentType that holds data for a budget account segment. Budget account segments can be functional or administrative areas, development programs, projects, budget concepts or units, activities, financial sources, geographic regions, etcetera. BudgetAccountSegment instances are the constitutive parts of budget accounts.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.BudgetAccountSegmentType
member.summary: Power type that describes a budget account segment partitioned type.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.BudgetAccountType
member.summary: Power type that describes a budget account.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.UseCases.BudgetAccountSegmentUseCases
member.summary: Use cases for budget account segments.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.UseCases.BudgetTypesUseCases
member.summary: Use cases for budget types searching and retriving.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.UseCases.BudgetUseCases
member.summary: Use cases for budgets searching and updating.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Budget
member.summary: Partitioned type that represents a budget and serves as an aggregate root for its accounts.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.BudgetType
member.summary: Power type that describes a budget.
